note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes; pending = specified behavior whose loadable connector module (Phase 1-3) does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior). REQ-821 (the module framework) is BOUND — TestConnectorsAcceptance drives the real modules.Registry. Each per-connector scenario is pending until its owning task builds the module.
